creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/x11/#x-compiz-video-card> 

> … To determine which nVidia driver is needed see the FAQ question 
> on the subject. …

– refers to an anchor that does not exist: 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/faq/#idp59950544>

NVIDIA _is_ mentioned under 
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/faq/#x-3d-acceleration>, however for "which card is supported by which driver" there's reference to <http://www.nvidia.com/object/IO_32667.html>, which (a separate bug) is _not_ the best page to tell which driver is appropriate because the result is legacy-only <https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/drivers/unix/legacy-gpu/>.
